analyst_observations: The one with_skill failure (linkedin-about: impact_not_difficulty) is an assertion defect — the regex vocabulary is too narrow. The output expresses the right idea ('engineers who grow past what you could have done alone') but doesn't match the pattern terms. Recommend loosening to manual.
The meetup-intro canonical_closer assertion is the sharpest discriminator: without_skill fails it (ends on the band instead of the closer), with_skill passes perfectly.
Speaker bio: the third_career_framing manual assertion cleanly differentiates. without_skill added gravitas ('one of the most competitive programs in the country') and buried Deadiron as a footnote.
Personal details (Columbus, Ohio) leaked into both with_skill outputs (speaker bio and LinkedIn About) from this iteration. The SKILL.md has been updated to explicitly block this.
